core_conditions.name: Editable Default
core_conditions.pass_condition: dominant path can still be revised, contested, bypassed, or reopened

core_conditions.name: Distributed Authority
core_conditions.pass_condition: design, revision, appeal, exit, audit, and rollback authority are not monopolized by one center

core_conditions.name: Rollback Window
core_conditions.pass_condition: rollback remains materially feasible before restoration cost threshold is crossed

core_conditions.name: Exception Channel
core_conditions.pass_condition: non-default signals can re-enter and affect transition path
